## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test --filter=@ai-video-editor/api` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for new behavior
- [ ] Updated `AGENTS.md` if conventions changed
- [ ] UI changes include screenshot
- [ ] Follows single-source-of-truth rule for shared schemas
